code: const API_BASE_URL="http://localhost:8000/index.php?route=";async function request(route){let options=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}${route}`,{headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",...(options.headers||{})},...options});const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.message||"Request failed");}return data;}export async function searchFlights(_ref){let{origin,destination,date}=_ref;const params=new URLSearchParams({origin,destination,...(date?{date}:{})});return request(`flights/search&${params.toString()}`);}export async function getFlightCities(){return request("flights/cities");}export async function createReservation(payload){return request("reservations",{method:"POST",body:JSON.stringify(payload)});}export async function getReservations(){return request("reservations");}export async function getItineraryByReservation(reservationId){return request(`itineraries/reservation/${reservationId}`);}
